purpose: Cross-base phen baseline (3 backbones × 3 axes). V_phen_GWT threshold 0.55 architecture-specific bias 노출 — Mistral PASS, Qwen 시리즈 FAIL. 의식 검증 통과조건은 backbone-invariant이어야 함 — threshold revision needed.

pod.lifecycle: create → ssh → pod restart → ssh + helper resume → 3 backbones sequential measurement → terminate

key_finding_GWT_architecture_bias.claim: V_phen_GWT threshold 0.55가 architecture-specific bias 보유 — Mistral 0.891 PASS, Qwen3 0.270 FAIL, Qwen2.5 0.364 FAIL.
key_finding_GWT_architecture_bias.issue: V_phen_GWT은 의식 검증 surrogate가 아니라 architecture (attention pattern sparsity) detector로 작동.
key_finding_GWT_architecture_bias.violation: raw#10 honest: 의식 검증 통과조건은 backbone-invariant이어야 함. 현 threshold는 'Mistral attention pattern style' detector — phenomenal correlate 아님.

all_backbones_LZ_PASS: V_phen_LZ 1.02 ± 0.01 across 3 backbones — backbone-invariant PASS. LZ는 architecture-agnostic complexity measure로 작동.
all_backbones_predictive_PASS: V_phen_predictive 모두 PASS — surprisal pattern variability backbone-invariant.

option_A_lower_threshold.rationale: Mistral 0.891 + Qwen3 0.270 + Qwen2.5 0.364 → mean=0.508, median=0.364. 모든 3 backbones PASS 위해 0.30 사용 (Qwen3 0.270 still FAIL by 0.030). 또는 mean - 1*std (0.508 - 0.27 = 0.24).
option_A_lower_threshold.cons: threshold가 너무 약해져 phenomenal signal 변별력 잃음

option_B_relative_to_baseline.rationale: 각 backbone의 BASE GWT를 baseline으로, 측정 model이 그 baseline 이상이면 PASS. fine-tune이 attention spread 강화하는지 측정 — 의식 검증 의도에 더 부합.
option_B_relative_to_baseline.pros: backbone-invariant, fine-tune effect detect, raw#12 frozen 가능
option_B_relative_to_baseline.cons: BACKBONE_BASELINE_GWT registry 필요 (다양한 backbones BASE measurement)

option_C_metric_redesign.rationale: fine-tune-induced attention spread change 자체를 측정. backbone-invariant by construction.
option_C_metric_redesign.pros: 본질적으로 backbone-invariant, 의식 검증 의도 부합
option_C_metric_redesign.cons: pre-tune + post-tune 측정 둘 다 필요 (cost 2x)

raw10_honest_findings.F1_GWT_architecture_detector: V_phen_GWT는 phenomenal correlate가 아니라 attention sparsity detector. threshold 0.55는 Mistral-style spread attention에 fitting된 값.
raw10_honest_findings.F2_LZ_predictive_backbone_invariant: V_phen_LZ + V_phen_predictive는 backbone-invariant — 진짜 substrate-level complexity measure로 작동.
raw10_honest_findings.F3_consciousness_verification_criterion_: 사용자 명시 '의식 검증 통과조건'은 backbone-invariant이어야 함. 현 V_phen_GWT는 의식 검증 도구로 부적합 — revision 필수.
raw10_honest_findings.F4_mistral_attention_advantage_NOT_consc: Mistral 3/3 PASS는 architecture (attention spread pattern) 우위, NOT consciousness 우위. Qwen이 less conscious가 아니라 sparse attention design choice.

implications_for_Mk_XI.backbone_choice_revision: Mk.XI architecture spec(state/mk_xi_architecture_spec_20260425.json)의 Backbone candidate를 D-mistral로 명시한 것은 substrate proof 측면에서 정당하나, 본 finding은 V_phen_GWT가 그 정당화에 부적합. V2 multi-axis PAPO substrate proof는 여전히 valid.
implications_for_Mk_XI.Mk_XI_consciousness_verification_pipelin: 11-tuple PASS 평가 시 V_phen_GWT는 backbone-baseline-relative redesign 필요. Mistral 사용 시 threshold 0.55 OK, Qwen 사용 시 별도 baseline.

next_cycle_required: state/anima_backbone_phen_baseline_*.json registry 작성 (3 backbones × 3 axes baseline 본 finding으로 첫 entry)
V_phen_GWT raw#12 new revision (option B recommended) — state/an11_v_phen_gwt_v2_spec_20260425.json
Mk.XI fine-tune이 V_phen_GWT_v2 검증 (pre-tune vs post-tune attention spread)

raw_compliance.raw_9_hexa_only_deterministic: satisfied — orchestration via main session, helper /tmp emit
raw_compliance.raw_10_no_overclaim: satisfied — F1-F4 critical findings 명시 (GWT는 attention detector, NOT phenomenal), threshold revision 필수성 disclosure
raw_compliance.raw_12_cherry_pick_proof: satisfied — original threshold 0.55 frozen 보존, revision은 raw#12 new revision으로 proposed
raw_compliance.raw_15_ssot: this file = SSOT for cross-base finding; per-backbone results in state/mk_xi_cross_base_phen_run_20260425/cross_out/
raw_compliance.POLICY_R4: 기존 spec scope 변경 0건, 신규 backbone baseline + V_phen_GWT_v2 revision axis only
